name: to_render mess summary
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Hostel Admission', { refresh: function(frm) { render\_mess\_summary(frm); }, mess\_required: function(frm) { render\_mess\_summary(frm); }, food\_preference: function(frm) { render\_mess\_summary(frm); }, meal\_plan: function(frm) { render\_mess\_summary(frm); }, mess\_fee: function(frm) { render\_mess\_summary(frm); } }); function render\_mess\_summary(frm) { let mess\_required = frm.doc.mess\_required ? "Yes" : "No"; let status = frm.doc.mess\_required ? "Active" : "Inactive"; let status\_color = frm.doc.mess\_required ? "green" : "red"; let food = frm.doc.food\_preference || "-"; let meal\_plan = frm.doc.meal\_plan || "-"; let fee = frm.doc.mess\_fee ? format\_currency(frm.doc.mess\_fee, frm.doc.currency) : "-"; let html = ` MESS DETAILS  | Mess Required | ${mess\_required} | | --- | --- | | Food | ${food} | | Meal Plan | ${meal\_plan} | | Mess Fee | ${fee}${frm.doc.mess\_fee ? ' / Month' : ''} | | Status | ${status} |   `; frm.set\_df\_property('mess\_summary\_html', 'options', html); frm.refresh\_field('mess\_summary\_html'); }
